title: Kani bounded verification for bitvec tail masking
description:
Scope narrowed: montgomery/gfp/quadratic harnesses are redundant with Lean4 proofs. `max_unreduced_additions` is a natural Lean4 target (separate follow-up issue).

This issue covers only `bitvec.rs` Kani harnesses + CI job:

- Add `#[cfg(kani)]` proof harnesses in `bitvec.rs`:
  - Pure-logic: `mask_tail_zeros_padding`, `mask_tail_preserves_valid_bits`, `ones_constructor_tail_clean`
  - Struct-level (if Kani supports Mutex/Vec): `shift_left_preserves_invariant`, `not_into_preserves_invariant`, `bit_xor_into_preserves_invariant`
- Add CI job: `cargo kani -p gf2-core`

**Success criteria**: `cargo kani -p gf2-core` passes all harnesses
